projects.title: AI Chat Assistant
projects.description: An intelligent chatbot powered by OpenAI's GPT API with natural language understanding and context-aware responses.
projects.longDescription: Built a full-stack AI chat application using React, Node.js, and OpenAI's GPT API. Features include conversation history, context retention, multi-language support, and a beautiful UI with real-time typing indicators.

projects.title: E-Commerce Platform
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce platform with cart, payments, and admin dashboard.
projects.longDescription: Complete e-commerce solution with user authentication, product catalog, shopping cart, Stripe payment integration, order management, and admin dashboard for inventory management.

projects.title: Task Management App
projects.description: A collaborative task management tool with real-time updates and team features.
projects.longDescription: Trello-like task management application with drag-and-drop, real-time collaboration using WebSockets, team workspaces, and progress tracking.

projects.title: Weather Forecast App
projects.description: Beautiful weather app with 7-day forecast and location-based predictions.
projects.longDescription: Modern weather application using OpenWeatherMap API with geolocation, 7-day forecast, hourly updates, beautiful animations, and dark/light themes.

projects.title: Java Banking System
projects.description: Console-based banking system with OOP concepts and file handling.
projects.longDescription: A complete banking system in Java demonstrating OOP principles including inheritance, polymorphism, encapsulation. Features account management, transactions, and persistent storage.

projects.title: Python Data Analyzer
projects.description: Data analysis tool with visualization and statistical insights.
projects.longDescription: Python-based data analysis tool using Pandas, NumPy, and Matplotlib. Supports CSV/Excel imports, statistical analysis, and beautiful chart visualizations.

projects.title: Fitness Tracker Mobile App
projects.description: React Native fitness tracking app with workout plans and progress charts.
projects.longDescription: Cross-platform mobile fitness app with workout tracking, calorie counter, progress charts, and personalized workout plans.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: Modern portfolio website with animations and dark mode.
projects.longDescription: A beautiful, responsive portfolio website built with React, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion featuring glassmorphism, animations, and dark/light themes.
